title: Design reviewed queue reconcile apply path
goal: Define and implement a guarded apply path for queue-reconcile recommendations so now/next lane promotions can be applied only from a reviewed plan artifact.

metadata.source: Registered after PR #253 intentionally shipped queue-reconcile as read-only only.
metadata.safety_boundary: No automatic promotion. Apply must require reviewed plan evidence, current registry hash, dry-run parity and doctor/registry-truth gates.

acceptance.assertion: Apply mode requires an explicit reviewed plan artifact with expected queue diff and registry head.
Apply refuses if dry-run findings changed since the reviewed plan was generated.
bureau check, doctor and registry-truth must pass after any queue mutation.
Applying a queue change does not claim or dispatch work.
